prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game character portrait
Primary request: full-body dance battle character art of Vexa Volt, Street Dance Champion
Scene/background: Neon City with layered arena depth and subtle energy effects
Style/medium: stylized 2D game concept art, clean silhouette, premium mobile game quality
Composition/framing: centered character, vertical frame, readable pose and costume details
Lighting/mood: dramatic key light with accent color #FF7A24
Color palette: anchored by #FF7A24 with complementary cyan and warm highlights
Materials/textures: fabrics and accessories inspired by Electric billboards, graffiti alleys, glowing skateparks.
Constraints: preserve this personality - Bold, flashy, and full of swagger; speaks in punchy beats and graffiti tags.; no text; no logos; no watermark; single character only
Avoid: muddy contrast; cluttered background; photorealism; oversaturated neon
